scope: Public README + variable-map documentation refresh with regenerated real-art screenshots; docs/screenshots only, no code/data/smoke change.
summary: Brought the public-facing README and the variable map into honest agreement with the current build after the FQ-09U3 + Codex art closeout. All 9 README screenshots were recaptured from a windowed COHERONIA_SHOTS=1 tour (windowed because the frame grab uses RenderingServer.frame_post_draw, which hangs headless) and each was visually reviewed; they now show real generated sprite art (blocks, items, enemies, five player species, the wooden Town Hall, parallax backdrops) and the title screen's new Music/Sound sliders, plus a fresh underground cave-darkness shot. Honest corrections: the suite count is 257 (was 234/190); the 'no audio' claim is gone because the adaptive score, event stingers, and volume settings ship (operator listening approval 2026-07-10); 'placeholder art' is reframed to image-first-with-fallback (real art for live categories, code-drawn fallback only for the still-unauthored gear overlays, opening cels, and UI icons); the adaptive-music bullet covers U3. A new 'Characters are data' section shows the three character authorities with real trait/role/body-rig JSON excerpts and states plainly that 5 of 12 defined ancestries are playable. The roadmap now lists concrete planned additions. VARIABLE_MATRIX was re-audited against this run and gained authority rows for event stingers+ducking, audio settings, player body art+rig, and Town Hall/world-anchor art.
acceptance: All 9 screenshots regenerated windowed and visually reviewed; underground + title shots added to the README grid
No stale claims remain: 234/190 -> 257, 'no audio' removed, 'placeholder art' reframed honestly (grep-verified)
New 'Characters are data' section with real excerpts from character_data.json and player_visuals.json
VARIABLE_MATRIX re-audited with four new authority-surface rows
validate_repo.py PASS (README + VARIABLE_MATRIX file/phrase-lock checks green); git diff --check clean
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS (exit 0), README.md and docs/VARIABLE_MATRIX.md pass
git diff --check -> only expected LF->CRLF notices
COHERONIA_SHOTS=1 windowed run -> exit 0, 9/9 PNGs written, each reviewed as an image
decisions: Recaptured screenshots windowed rather than trusting stale placeholder-era images - honesty over convenience; each frame reviewed before use
Reframed art/audio claims to the true current state instead of the aspirational old wording
Kept HANDOFF.md untouched: this is a docs refresh, not an FQ feature increment, so it stays out of the feature handoff stream
Full protocol closeout (ledger + packets) applied even for a docs run, per the operator's 'use the same protocols' instruction
risks: Screenshots are staged compositions (gear/stockpile/torches set up by the tour) - representative, not a fixed playthrough
Screenshot fidelity depends on re-running the windowed tour after future art changes; the README documents the windowed requirement
next_action: FQ-10: more ores and metallurgy data. Art backlog via docs/ASSET_ROADMAP.md.
